narrative: President Trump cancels planned Iran strike on Saudi and UAE request, easing geopolitical risk as Washington offers temporary oil sanctions relief. Dollar retreats as tensions cool — DXY -0.30%; gold higher +0.15%; equities -0.07%; VIX 17.8. Japan FinMin Katayama warns of speculative FX moves as USD/JPY holds 158.81; 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains the bid but options show strong downside hedging with -1.66 25d RR. Watch RBNZ meeting May 27.
